summary: The diff implements REQ-11 (backend burn fee reduced to 2 base units) and REQ-12 (frontend UI updated to show 0.02 IPGT). REQ-13 (session persistence across page reloads) is not addressed anywhere in the diff — no changes were made to useInternetIdentity.ts or any session-restoration logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Persist Internet Identity authenticated session across page reloads using AuthClient's local storage persistence, automatically restoring an existing session on app startup without requiring the user to log in again.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or any related session persistence logic appear anywhere in the diff. The frontend-file-summaries.txt does not mention any session persistence update for the auth hook, and no new files related to session restoration were added.
